## dedicated to accelerating & enabling your digital ambition.

We are your digital enablement partner to accelerate your transformation journey. Whether it is augmenting your existing team, leveraging our global talent centers for specialized skills, or delivering managed programs across focused industries, we’re designed to enable your digital journey.

At Randstad Digital, we believe that when you bring talent together, inject experience and follow a proven approach, amazing things can be achieved. You select the combination of models to accelerate your digital enablement.

results.title: Randstad Digital
results.author: Exa
results.text:
# Randstad Digital

Randstad Digital is a IT Services and IT Consulting company. Tabak Nitz is a company specializing in cigars, wipes, cigars, and accessories in Rostock. They offer exclusive products, selected nuts items, and various cigar specialties from Cuba. They also have an online shop where customers can browse their products. Randstad Digital employs 1,993 people (+8.0% YoY, +185 people) and has an annual revenue of EUR123.7M. Headquartered in Leuven, Flemish Region, Belgium, operates in 24 countries (including India, United States, France, Canada, and Spain).

## About
Randstad Digital is a trusted digital enablement partner that facilitates accelerated transformation for businesses by providing global talent, capacity, and solutions across specialized domains. Our talent solutions allow you to seamlessly scale your team while connecting you with skilled professionals around the world who align with your chosen technologies. Our focus lies in managed solutions, and we empower businesses to move at speed and achieve goals efficiently. We support four service lines including customer experience, digital and product engineering, data and analytics, and cloud transformation in addition to three engagement models including talent services, global talent centers, and managed solution capabilities. 

Randstad Digital was announced on August 30, 2023, under the umbrella of Randstad, the world’s largest talent company and a partner of choice to clients. Randstad has a deep understanding of the labor market and helps clients to create the high-quality, diverse, and agile workforces they need to succeed. Our 46,000 employees around the world make a positive impact on society by helping people to realize their true potential throughout their working life. 

Randstad was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Diemen, the Netherlands. In 2022, in our 39 markets, we helped more than 2 million people find a job that feels good and advised over 230,000 clients on their talent needs. We generated revenue of €27.6 billion. Randstad N.V. is listed on the Euronext Amsterdam. For more information, see www.randstad.com.

## Company Details
- Industry: IT Services and IT Consulting
- Type: Public Company
- Headquarters: Leuven, Belgium
- Homepage: randstaddigital.com
- Status: active
- Aliases: randstad digital, randstad digital belgium
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/randstaddigital
- Linkedin Followers: 299,241 (Monthly: +2.7%)
- Phone: (91235944

## Financials
- Annual Revenue: EUR 123,715,752

## Workforce
- Employees: 1,993
 - Monthly Growth: +0.2%
 - Yearly Growth: +8.0%
- Key Executives:
 - Anita Vitran: Product Owner (joined Oct 2025)
 - Sai Prasad: Executive Business Partner (joined Oct 2025)
 - Rim Hnana: Engagement Delivery Director (joined Oct 2025)
 - Kilian Braune: Sales Partner (joined Oct 2025)
 - Pravallika Srigiri: Marketing Business Partner (joined Oct 2025)
 - Steve Rosenberg: Global IT Delivery Director (joined Nov 2025)

results.title: Randstad executes its partner for talent strategy to become a digital-first talent company | Randstad
results.text:
Randstad executes its partner for talent strategy to become a digital-first talent company | Randstad

## Randstad provides an update on the delivery of specialization and experience at scale through the Randstad Talent Platform at its capital markets event

Randstad NV, a global talent leader, is hosting a capital markets event today to provide an update on the progress of its partner for talent strategy and its transition to a digital-first talent company powered by the Randstad Talent Platform.

Building on its global scale, expertise and values, Randstad is transforming rapidly towards a digital-first model. Shifting from a generalist, demand-based staffing model to a provider of specialized, forecast-driven talent solutions, delivering specialization and seamless experience at scale.

### partner for talent strategy

In October 2023, Randstad set out its partner for talent strategy, anchored in five pillars. The business has made significant progress executing this strategy, despite challenging market conditions. The key developments delivered to date include:

Growth through specialization: completed the implementation of the specialization framework in all markets, providing focused expertise in Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise to meet the evolving demands of clients and talent;

Talent and equity at the heart: a specialized talent attraction approach and talent communities have been initiated across the specializations and growth segments;

Delivery excellence: opened 18 talent centers in 16 markets with over 750 professionals and 52 delivery centers with 900 professionals across the 9 largest markets. Delivering significant improvements in fill rates, talent utilization and client satisfaction;

Randstad Talent Platform: implementation underway, and in Q1 2025 500,000 shifts were filled through the platform. Randstad now generates €2 bn of revenue through its digital marketplaces;

Best team in the industry: reinforced specialization leadership and empowered Randstad’s team with 75%+ of colleagues now in a specialized career trajectory.

### Randstad Talent Platform

The Randstad Talent Platform is at the core of Randstad’s business. It will be the primary way of engaging with clients and talent, to provide seamless experience at scale across all talent service models, including digital marketplaces. Through these digital marketplaces, Randstad will become digital-first for clients and talent, augmented with human engagement where it has the greatest impact.

Powered by one global backbone of front, mid and back office systems, the Randstad Talent Platform will harmonize and automate workflows, driving efficiency and standardization across the business. At present, €2 billion in revenue runs through Randstad’s digital marketplaces and it is expected that the Randstad Talent Platform will go live in the majority of markets over the next two years.

At today’s event, the leadership team will provide a deep dive into three

results.title: Randstad advances shift to ‘digital’ with plans to expand talent platform
results.author: Danny Romero
results.text:
Randstad advances shift to ‘digital’ with plans to expand talent platform

# Randstad advances shift to ‘digital’ with plans to expand talent platform

# Randstad advances shift to ‘digital’ with plans to expand talent platform

Danny Romero

| April 24, 2025

- LinkedIn
- Twitter / X
- Email

Source: Sharon Thomas

## main article

Randstad, the world’s largest staffing firm, provided an update on its transition to a digital-first talent firm powered by the Randstad Talent Platform.

Currently, €2 billion in revenue runs through Randstad’s digital marketplaces and the staffing giant expects that the Randstad Talent Platform will go live in the majority of markets over the next two years.

Its talent platform aims to be the primary way of engaging with clients and talent. Randstad expects the platform to provide a seamless experience at scale across all talent service models, including digital marketplaces. Through these digital marketplaces, Randstad will become digital-first for clients and talent, augmented with human engagement where it has the greatest impact.

“Randstad is becoming digital-first,” Sander van ‘t Noordende, CEO of Randstad, said in a press release. “With the Randstad Talent Platform at the core, we can deliver specialisation and seamless experience at scale. Digital marketplaces, complemented by other service delivery channels, will be the driving force behind our business, enabling us to forecast talent needs and provide immediate talent availability to our clients. As we look forward, we are confident our partner for talent strategy positions Randstad to deliver profitable growth in the years ahead.”

Randstad’s three digital marketplaces include:

- Randstad Operational: The Randstad App in North America caters to both clients and talent in specialised operational roles;
- Randstad Professional: Zorgwerk by Randstad is a 100% digital marketplace that serves the growing healthcare market in the Netherlands and ensures immediate talent availability across all work arrangements;
- Randstad Digital: Randstad Digital powered by Torc, an AI-powered talent marketplace platform, has a community of over 1 million specialised digital talent.

At its capital markets event today, the company will also provide an update on its ‘partner for talent strategy’, which it unveiled in October 2023.

Randstad said it has since made ‘significant progress executing this strategy, despite challenging market conditions’.

The key developments delivered to date include:

- Growth through specialisation: completed the implementation of the specialisation framework in all markets, providing focused expertise in operational, professional, digital and enterprise to meet the evolving demands of clients and talent;
- Talent and equity at the heart: a specialised talent attraction approach and talent communities have been initiated across the specialisations and growth segments;
- Delivery excellence: opened 18 talent centres in 16 markets with over 750 p
